title: BEM-541.1 provider probe before reserve
objective:
Run script:
"""
base = Path('governance/internal_contour/tests/bem541')
base.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
reports = Path('governance/reports')
reports.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
proofs = Path('governance/codex/proofs')
proofs.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
protocols = Path('governance/protocols')
protocols.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
transport = Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
provider_state_path = Path('governance/state/provider_contour_state.json')
role_state_path = Path('governance/state/role_cycle_state.json')
cycle = 'bem541-provider-probe-before-reserve'

protocol = protocols / 'PROVIDER_PROBE_BEFORE_RESERVE.md'
protocol.write_text('# BEM-541.1 | Provider Probe Before Reserve\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 14:22 (UTC+3)\n\n## Правило\nПеред выбором GPT reserve система обязана проверить Claude primary. Silent switch to reserve запрещён.\n\n## Источники сигнала Claude\n1. Последняя запись transport для provider=`claude`.\n2. Последний outcome/status из `claude.yml`, записанный в transport.\n3. TTL/missing result после ожидания Claude.\n\n## Decision matrix\n| Probe signal | Decision | Обоснование |\n|---|---|---|\n| active/completed | select_claude_primary | Claude отвечает, reserve не нужен |\n| failed/cancelled/timeout/missing_result_after_ttl | select_gpt_reserve | Claude недоступен или лимит/ошибка |\n| unknown/no_signal | select_claude_primary_with_probe_required | Нельзя молча уходить в reserve без evidence |\n\n## Audit requirement\nКаждый выбор пишет `provider_probe_result` и `provider_selection_decision` в `governance/transport/results.jsonl`.\n')

# Read existing transport and infer latest Claude provider signal if present.
transport_records = []
if transport.exists():
    for line in transport.read_text(errors='ignore').splitlines():
        if not line.strip():
            continue
        try:
            rec = json.loads(line)
        except Exception:
            continue
        transport_records.append(rec)
claude_records = []
for rec in transport_records:
    body = json.dumps(rec, ensure_ascii=False).lower()
    if rec.get('provider') == 'claude' or rec.get('primary_provider') == 'claude' or 'claude' in body:
        claude_records.append(rec)
latest_claude = claude_records[-1] if claude_records else None
latest_status = None if latest_claude is None else latest_claude.get('status')
latest_signal = None
if latest_status in ['completed','active']:
    latest_signal = 'active'
elif latest_status in ['failed','cancelled','timeout']:
    latest_signal = latest_status
else:
    latest_signal = 'unknown'

# Current policy after operator correction: unknown means do NOT reserve; keep Claude primary and request probe evidence.
def decide(signal):
    if signal in ['active','completed']:
        return {'selected_provider':'claude','reserve_used':False,'decision':'select_claude_primary','reason':'claude_primary_available'}
    if signal in ['failed','cancelled','timeout','missing_result_after_ttl']:
        return {'selected_provider':'gpt','reserve_used':True,'decision':'select_gpt_reserve','reason':'claude_' + signal}
    return {'selected_provider':'claude','reserve_used':False,'decision':'select_claude_primary_with_probe_required','reason':'no_valid_failure_evidence_for_reserve'}

actual_decision = decide(latest_signal)
probe_record = {
  'record_type':'provider_probe_result',
  'cycle_id':cycle,
  'source':'internal_provider_probe',
  'provider':'claude',
  'probe_signal':latest_signal,
  'latest_claude_record_found': latest_claude is not None,
  'latest_claude_status':latest_status,
  'latest_claude_record':latest_claude,
  'status':'completed',
  'artifact_path':'governance/internal_contour/tests/bem541/provider_probe_actual.json',
  'commit_sha':None,
  'blocker':None,
  'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 14:22 (UTC+3)'
}
selection_record = {
  'record_type':'provider_selection_decision',
  'cycle_id':cycle,
  'source':'internal_provider_adapter',
  'from_role':'provider_adapter',
  'to_role':'curator',
  'primary_provider':'claude',
  'reserve_provider':'gpt',
  'probe_signal':latest_signal,
  'selected_provider':actual_decision['selected_provider'],
  'reserve_used':actual_decision['reserve_used'],
  'decision':actual_decision['decision'],
  'reason':actual_decision['reason'],
  'status':'completed',
  'artifact_path':'governance/internal_contour/tests/bem541/provider_selection_actual.json',
  'commit_sha':None,
  'blocker':None,
  'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 14:22 (UTC+3)'
}

(base/'provider_probe_actual.json').write_text(json.dumps(probe_record, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
(base/'provider_selection_actual.json').write_text(json.dumps(selection_record, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

# Synthetic branch proofs: Claude active -> Claude; Claude failed -> GPT. These prove matrix behavior.
synthetic_records = []
for signal in ['active','failed']:
    d = decide(signal)
    rec = {
      'record_type':'provider_selection_decision_test',
      'cycle_id':cycle,
      'source':'synthetic_matrix_check',
      'provider':'claude',
      'probe_signal':signal,
      'selected_provider':d['selected_provider'],
      'reserve_used':d['reserve_used'],
      'decision':d['decision'],
      'reason':d['reason'],
      'status':'completed',
      'artifact_path':'governance/internal_contour/tests/bem541/provider_selection_test_' + signal + '.json',
      'commit_sha':None,
      'blocker':None,
      'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 14:22 (UTC+3)'
    }
    (base/('provider_selection_test_' + signal + '.json')).write_text(json.dumps(rec, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
    synthetic_records.append(rec)

with transport.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(json.dumps(probe_record, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
    f.write(json.dumps(selection_record, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
    for rec in synthetic_records:
        f.write(json.dumps(rec, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

provider_state = json.loads(provider_state_path.read_text()) if provider_state_path.exists() else {}
provider_state['updated_at'] = '2026-05-17 | 14:22 (UTC+3)'
provider_state['probe_before_reserve_required'] = True
provider_state['last_provider_probe'] = probe_record
provider_state['last_provider_selection'] = selection_record
provider_state['selected_provider'] = actual_decision['selected_provider']
provider_state['reserve_used'] = actual_decision['reserve_used']
provider_state['last_switch_reason'] = None if not actual_decision['reserve_used'] else actual_decision['reason']
provider_state['blocker'] = None
provider_state_path.write_text(json.dumps(provider_state, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

role_state = json.loads(role_state_path.read_text()) if role_state_path.exists() else {}
role_state['updated_at'] = '2026-05-17 | 14:22 (UTC+3)'
role_state['cycle_id'] = cycle
role_state['active_role'] = 'provider_adapter'
role_state['next_role'] = 'curator'
role_state['current_task'] = {'id':'BEM-541.1','title':'Provider live probe before reserve','status':'completed'}
role_state['blocker'] = None
hist = role_state.get('history', [])
if not isinstance(hist, list): hist = [hist]
hist.append({'at':'2026-05-17 | 14:22 (UTC+3)','event':'BEM-541.1 provider probe before reserve','status':'PASS','selected_provider':actual_decision['selected_provider'],'reserve_used':actual_decision['reserve_used']})
role_state['history'] = hist
role_state_path.write_text(json.dumps(role_state, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

ok = synthetic_records[0]['selected_provider'] == 'claude' and synthetic_records[1]['selected_provider'] == 'gpt' and selection_record['selected_provider'] == 'claude' if latest_signal == 'unknown' else True
report = reports/'bem541_1_provider_probe_before_reserve.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-541.1 | Provider Probe Before Reserve | ' + ('PASS' if ok else 'BLOCKER') + '\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 14:22 (UTC+3)\n\n## Итог\nSilent switch to GPT reserve запрещён. Система сначала пишет provider_probe_result, затем provider_selection_decision.\n\n## Actual repository probe\n| Наименование | Описание | Обоснование |\n|---|---|---|\n| latest Claude record found | ' + str(latest_claude is not None) + ' | scan governance/transport/results.jsonl |\n| probe signal | ' + str(latest_signal) + ' | inferred from latest Claude status |\n| selected provider | ' + actual_decision['selected_provider'] + ' | ' + actual_decision['reason'] + ' |\n| reserve used | ' + str(actual_decision['reserve_used']) + ' | reserve only after failed/cancelled/timeout evidence |\n\n## Matrix tests\n| Signal | Selected provider | Reserve used |\n|---|---|---|\n| active | ' + synthetic_records[0]['selected_provider'] + ' | ' + str(synthetic_records[0]['reserve_used']) + ' |\n| failed | ' + synthetic_records[1]['selected_provider'] + ' | ' + str(synthetic_records[1]['reserve_used']) + ' |\n\n## Blocker\n' + ('null' if ok else 'PROVIDER_PROBE_MATRIX_FAILED') + '\n')
proof = proofs/'bem541_1_provider_probe_before_reserve.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-541.1 ' + ('PASS' if ok else 'BLOCKER') + ': provider probe before reserve enforced; actual selected_provider=' + actual_decision['selected_provider'] + ', reserve_used=' + str(actual_decision['reserve_used']) + '\n')

changed_files.extend([str(protocol), str(base/'provider_probe_actual.json'), str(base/'provider_selection_actual.json'), str(base/'provider_selection_test_active.json'), str(base/'provider_selection_test_failed.json'), str(transport), str(provider_state_path), str(role_state_path), str(report), str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('BEM-541.1 provider probe before reserve enforced and recorded')
"""
No issue comments.
